tests.test_name: Download format extension matches selected format -- MD, shiftdoc-tca-story_sample.md
tests.feature: Story Coverage download — filename and format (mocked)
tests.description: Verifies that downloading coverage results in MD format produces a file with the correct .md extension and the original story filename.

test_coverage.verification_step: Given a coverage result is displayed from an uploaded story file
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A coverage result is available based on a story file the user uploaded

test_coverage.verification_step: When I click the Download MD button
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user initiates a download in Markdown format

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the downloaded file is named "shiftdoc-tca-story_sample.md"
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded file carries the correct name derived from the uploaded story file and the .md extension

tests.test_name: Download filename falls back to date-time when story is pasted
tests.feature: Story Coverage download — filename and format (mocked)
tests.description: Verifies that when a user pastes story content instead of uploading a file, the downloaded coverage report uses a date-time stamp in its filename rather than a story-derived name.

test_coverage.verification_step: Given a coverage result is displayed
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A coverage result is available from pasted story content (no uploaded file)

test_coverage.verification_step: When I click the Download MD button
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user initiates a download in Markdown format
The downloaded filename contains a date-time stamp instead of a story name, ensuring a meaningful fallback when no filename is available
